name: Kingdom of Alba Assault Detachment
description: Scottish melee specialists. Shock Troopers and Lieutenant gain STRONG. MHI swap Ranged/Melee.
add_rules: Bagpipes: One Musical Instrument can be Bagpipes at no extra cost (friendly within 8" gain NEGATE FEAR).
Brave: +1 DICE to Morale Check Success Rolls.
Celtic Machine Armour: Models with Machine Armour charge D6" instead of reduced D3".
Claymore Smiths: Great Swords/Axes cost 7D instead of 12D.
Cold Steel: The FIRST Melee Weapon purchased for the warband costs half price (round up).
Dum-Dum Ammunition: Models can have Dum-Dum Bullets for 5D each (Limit: 3).
Highland Strength: Lieutenant and Shock Troopers gain STRONG keyword at no cost.
Lightly-armoured: Only Lieutenant and MHI can have Reinforced or Machine Armour.
Melee-focused: MHI has Melee +1 DICE and Ranged +0 DICE (swap from base).
Rampant Charge: All models in the warband have IGNORE DEFENDED OBSTACLE keyword.
Strained Supply: Automatic Shotguns, Grenade Launchers, Machine Guns, Sniper Rifles, and Submachine Guns have Limit: 1.
